title: Unova Universe
description: Official Modpack for Unova Universe, a Cobblemon Minecraft Server
body:
A very fresh, new Cobblemon server. **Server Address:** mc.tyllyn.com
**Discord:** https://discord.gg/4quUWY8Z8D This modpack is the official modpack for all client-side mods for Unova Universe. Unova Universe is a small, community-focused Cobblemon server, with an emphasis on keeping the experience simple and fun for all users. Current features include: - Claims - Own your own, protected piece of land! - Spawn - Community-built spawn area. - Kits - Daily kits and items to help everyone. - Economy - Custom NPC shopkeepers, with an economy system. Built around Fabric 1.20.1 Mods Include: - bad packets - BiomeInfo - Cloth Config API - Cobblemon - Cobblemon Spawn Notification - Fabric API - Fabric Language Kotlin - Forge Config API Port - Just Enough Items - Kiece - Cobblemon Minimap Icons - Mod Menu - WTHIT - Xaero's Minimap - Xaero's World Map
